agility.desc: Complete the Burthorpe agility course or the Gnome Stronghold agility course
Complete the Anachronia Beginner agility Course
Complete the Barbarian Outpost Agility Course

Complete the Wilderness Agility Course with the Demonic Skull - warning, the Demonic Skull will grant increase experience rates, however this will enable PvP. You can do the Wilderness agility course without the skull if you would like.
Het's Oasis Agility Course OR Manual Auto-cycles in the Empty Throne Room. Manual Auto-Cycles are extremely slow, but fully AFK.

Island-wide Anachronia Agility Course - Completion of this course requires level 85 Agility for one section, there are several ways to temporarily boost your Agility level including Stamina Potion (+6), Summer Pie (+5), God banner Boost (+5), Abyssal Lurker (+4).

archaeology.desc: Green Gobbo Goodies I - Tetracompass log
Warforge - Big High War God Shrine
Red Rum Relics I - Tetracompass log
Kharid-et - Culinarum Debris, Warforge - Kyzaj Champion's Boudoir

attack.desc: Troll Chucker in Burthorpe north caves
Ghost Troll Brutes in Um after the Necromancy! Quest
Ghoul in Canifis or Fetid Zombie outside Fort Forinthry w/ Salve Amulet
Desert Bandits in Bandit Camp w/ 1 piece of Saradomin or Zamorak equipment. A Halberd type weapon is recommended for best experience rates.
Hellhound in Taverly Dungeon or the Wilderness, or Abyssal leech/walker/guardian in the Abyss. A Halberd type weapon is recommended for best experience rates.

Kill Flesh-Hatcher Mhekarnahz. This entry-level boss provides 50% more experience for your damage dealt compared to other options, which makes it a strong active training method. If your hit chance is below 100%, consider using a slash weapon and the Dragon Scimitar special attack for improved damage.
Abyssal leech/walker/guardian in the Abyss or Bound Skeletons outside Fort Forinthry w/ Salve Amulet. A Halberd type weapon is recommended for best experience rates.

Ravenous ghoul w/ Vampyric Blood Essence for Aggression, Abyssal leech/walker/guardian in the Abyss or Bound Skeletons outside Fort Forinthry w/ Salve Amulet. A Halberd type weapon is recommended for best experience rates.

Abyssal Demons, Savages, or Beasts, Ravenous ghoul w/ Vampyric Blood Essence for Aggression, Abyssal leech/walker/guardian in the Abyss, or Bound Skeletons outside Fort Forinthry w/ Salve Amulet. Alternatively, train passively by doing PvM or Slayer.

constitution.desc: Train through your preferred combat training method

construction.desc: Fort Building - Workshop T1 and Wall as part of the New Foundations Quest

cooking.desc: Make Cheesecakes in the cooking guild after the Chef's Assistant quest with the Tier 2 Milky Milky Player Owned Farm Perk
Make Wine by adding grapes to jugs of water. This is not a good option for Ironman players but provides very high experience rates.
Cook Desert Sole, Catfish, and Beltfish
Cook Raw Fish from PvM Drops or Fish from Swarm Fishing / Blubber Jellyfish

crafting.desc: Cut gems from Common Gem Rocks in Burthorpe, or Spin Flax from Burthorpe, Or make Leather Armour from Cows in Burthorpe or Lumbridge.
Gate of Elidinis Crafting, Harps in Prifddinas, Cutting Gems, or Making Dragon Leather products.

defence.desc: Train through your preferred combat training method

divination.desc: Radiant Wisps on world 79 (for group divination bonuses). Better with a Memory Dowser, or Divine Conversion Archaeology Relic.
Luminescent Wisps on world 79 (for group divination bonuses). Better with a Memory Dowser, or Divine Conversion Archaeology Relic.
Incandescent Wisps on world 79 (for group divination bonuses). Better with a Memory Dowser, or Divine Conversion Archaeology Relic.

dungeoneering.desc: Complete Elite Dungeons and Redeem Tokens for Exp at the Reward Shop. This is not recommended for speed training but will passively grant experience
Small Complexity 1 floors 1-11, Small, Medium, or Large Complexity 6 floors 12-29
Small Complexity 1 floors 1-17, Small Complexity 6 Floors 18-24, Large Complexity 6 Floors 25-35
Small Complexity 1 floors 1-29, Large Complexity 6 Floors 30-47

Complete the Dragonkin V archaeology collection log (Archaeology level 77+) for Dungeoneering Token Boxes that can be exchanged for experience. This method is extremely slow but is a way to passively train Dungeoneering while training Archaeology.
Small Complexity 1 floors 1-35, Large Complexity 6 Floors 36-60

farming.desc: Shovelling manure or Violet is Blue Quest
Low level herb and tree runs. Oak at Level 15, Apple at Level 27, Willow at level 30. Low level seeds can be obtained by pickpocketing farmers and master farmers.
Cultivate Roses at Het's Oasis (active method)
Player-owned farm beginning with Sheep at level 35, Frogs at 42, and Cows at level 49
Optionally you train farming by doing Tree Runs and Fruit Tree runs if those are preferred to Player Owned Farms.
Player-owned farm, beginning with Chinchompas at level 54, Spiders at level 64, and Dragons at Level 92, and Dinosaurs at the Ranch Out of Time at level 98.

firemaking.desc: Burn magic logs or corrupted magic logs
Kill Vyres after the River of Blood quest. These are monsters that provide experience in Prayer, Combat, and Firemaking and are very efficient on an Ironman.
Collecting and burning Sharp Shell Shards. Collecting these requires the Extinction Quest, burning them does not.
Eggsperimentation Activity on Anachronia after the Extinction Quest.

fishing.desc: Catch Shrimp in Lumbridge or Catch crayfish in Burthorpe
Catch Trout and Salmon in Shilo Village or Lumbridge
Catch Desert Soles, Catfish and Beltfish in Menaphos
Afk Alternative - Catch Ghostly Soles in Um, Optionally use Shark Outfit to Destroy fish for 15 minute AFK.
Green Blubber Jellyfish in the Deep Sea Fishing Hub
Swarm fishing in the Deep Sea Fishing Hub - This is slower but yields useful food for PvM
Blue Blubber Jellyfish in the Deep Sea Fishing Hub
Prifddinas waterfall fishing (optional, to unlock the Crystal Fishing Rod)

fletching.desc: Make arrow shafts - Optional to stop at 25, but arrow shafts will be needed in abundance later if you are an Ironman. Higher tier logs yield more arrow shafts per log.
Make Mithril Arrows. Ironman players may choose to smith Mithril arrowheads for this method.
Make Broad arrows, arrowheads can be purchased from Slayer Masters.
Zygomyte Carestyling on Anachronia - These are part of the process of creating Elder God Arrows

herblore.desc: Daily Challenges, Herby Werby DnD, Weekly Penguins, and Quest EXP Lamps

hunter.desc: Catch Crimson Swifts in Burthorpe or complete the Natural history quiz in the Varrock museum.
Catch Copper Longtails at Eagle's Peak - You can teleport there with Memory Strands
Catch Cerulean Twitches in the Fremennik Hunter Area
Catch Tropical Wagtails in the Feldip Hills
Box trap Cobalt Skillchompas north of the Grand Tree.
Box trap Viridian Skillchompas in South of Port Phasmatys.
Catch Orange Salamanders in the Desert.
Box trap Grey Chinchompas at Piscatoris. You can teleport there with Memory Strands.
Catch Red Salamanders by the ZMI Altar
Box Trap Red Chinchompas in the Feldip Hills.
Catch Black Salamanders in the Wilderness.
Box trap Azure Skillchompas in the Fremennik Hunter Area.
Capture Charm Sprites for the Enhanced Yaktwee Stick.
Big Game Hunter. This requires level 55 slayer to start and offers higher experience rates at higher levels, ranging from 76-96 Hunter.
Catch Fungal Spores from Decaying Guards on the Croesus front (Semi-Afk), Trap Carrion Jadinkos on Anachronia.

invention.desc: Complete Invention tutorial with perfect discoveries or disassemble items
Research level 5 blueprints, augment and disassemble miscellaneous equipment

Siphon or disassemble leveled, augmented gear and tools, and complete Invention blueprints as you unlock them. You can also use Invention Potions to unlock higher level blueprints sooner for a boost to experience.

magic.desc: Troll Brutes in Burthorpe north caves
Ghost Troll Brutes in Um after the Necromancy! Quest.
Ghouls in Canifis with fire spells
Abyssal leech/walker/guardian in the Abyss - This is especially good if you have unlocked the Corruption Blast ability.
Kill Flesh-Hatcher Mhekarnahz. This entry-level boss provides 50% more experience for your damage dealt compared to other options, which makes it a strong active training method.
K'ril Tsutsaroth in God Wars Dungeon - Recommendation is to kite (fire abilities manually while running away from him) to extend trips.

Abyssal Demons, Savages, and Beasts, Ravenous ghoul w/ Vampyric Blood Essence for Aggression, Abyssal leech/walker/guardian in the Abyss, or Bound Skeletons outside Fort Forinthry w/ Salve Amulet. Alternatively, train passively by doing PvM or Slayer.

mining.desc: Shooting Stars - These are very afk, and great experience per hour at every level. The "Star Find" Friendschat can be used to find stars to train on. Limited to 3 per day.

Mine banite ore - This can be made more efficient and AFK by combining a perfect juju mining potion (or perfect plus), with the Explosive perk and the use of Stone Spirits to constantly reset the stamina bar to full.
Mine corrupted ore in Prifddinas - This is a very strong fully afk method as corrupted ore does not have a traditional stamina bar

Mine light animica or dark animica - This can be made more efficient and AFK by combining a perfect juju mining potion (or perfect plus), with the Explosive perk and the use of Stone Spirits to constantly reset the stamina bar to full.

Mine primal ores on Daemonheim - This can be made more efficient and AFK by combining a perfect juju mining potion (or perfect plus), with the Explosive perk and the use of Stone Spirits to constantly reset the stamina bar to full.

necromancy.desc: Kill ghostly troll bruiser or thrower, complete gear upgrades
Kill ghostly troll bruiser or thrower, complete Kili's Knowledge I
Kill ankous w/ Salve Amulet or ghouls, complete Kili's Knowledge II
Kill ghouls, shadow warriors, bandits, or fetid zombies W/ Salve amulet
Kill Flesh-Hatcher Mhekarnahz. This entry-level boss provides 50% more experience for your damage dealt compared to other options, which makes it a strong active training method.
Kill armoured zombies or bound skeletons w/ Salve amulet or exiled kalphite marauders.
Kill armoured zombies or bound skeletons w/ Salve amulet or kill abyssal demons or exiled kalphite marauders.
Kill armoured zombies or bound skeletons w/ Salve amulet or kill abyssal demons or abyssal savages.
Kill ravenous ghouls w/ a Blood Essence for permanent aggro, abyssal savages, abyssal beasts, or armoured phantoms. Alternatively, train passively by doing PvM or Slayer.
Perform greater necroplasm or powerful rituals with tier III glyphs - This can be especially useful to reach 30,000 souls in order to unlock the Rasial boss
Perform greater necroplasm or powerful rituals with tier III glyphs - in many cases this can be faster than training via combat, but it is more active.

prayer.desc: Offer Bones or Ashes at the Ectofunctus to unlock the First-Age outfit. Once unlocked, proceed to other methods
Use burial powders with bones at bank - For Ironman players, this requires both 90 Hunter and 90 Farming to do, but will yield the fastest EXP rates and is the most efficient.

If Burial Powders are not a viable option for you, offer bones at the Wilderness chaos altar, Fort Forinthry chapel altar, or POH altar - These grant different amounts of experience depending on achievement diary completion, altar type, and chapel tier, ranging from +50% to +250%.
Cleansing crystals in Prifddinas - This is a great Ironman Prayer training method so long as you have sufficient GP, as Cleansing Crystals can be purchased for gp in unlimited supplies.

Vyres after the River of Blood quest. This is a combat activity that provides experience in Prayer, Combat, and Firemaking. Very high requirements but is an efficient method of training multiple skills at once.

ranged.desc: Troll Shamans in Burthorpe north caves
Ghost Troll Brutes in Um after the Necromancy! Quest
Desert Bandits in Bandit Camp w/ 1 piece of Saradomin or Zamorak equipment.
Kill Flesh-Hatcher Mhekarnahz. This entry-level boss provides 50% more experience for your damage dealt compared to other options, which makes it a strong active training method.
Abyssal leech/walker/guardian in the Abyss - This is especially good if you have unlocked the Corruption Shot ability. Chinchompas can be used for greater experience rates.

Abyssal Demons, Savages, Ravenous ghoul w/ Vampyric Blood Essence for Aggression, Abyssal leech/walker/guardian in the Abyss, or Bound Skeletons outside Fort Forinthry w/ Salve Amulet. Alternatively, train passively by doing PvM or Slayer.

runecrafting.desc: Runespan and RuneSpheres - Runespheres are a daily DnD within the Runespan that rewards a flat 25000 experience per day.
Craft miasma runes, or any Necromancy runes as needed
Runecrafting at your highest level altar via the Abyss.
Runecrafting in the Abyss with the Runic Attuner - This will yield the highest experience rates overall.
Craft Soul Runes via the Abyss - This yields the highest experience per Pure Essence, which makes it a very good option for Essence-starved players.

Upgrading Eternal Magic Weapons - This is more afk than traditional Runecrafting and more experience per essence, which makes it good on ironman accounts. You can expect upwards of 250,000 experience per hour doing this method, at a cost of ~2000 pure essence

slayer.desc: Complete the "Natural History Museum" Quiz in Varrock.
Story Mode Vorkath with a 'Zamouregal's Undead' or 'Blue Dragons' Slayer assignment - Extra Experience can be gained by also using a Scrimshaw of Sacrifice.
Obtain the components required to make a Slayer Helmet

Train slayer at high level masters that assign tasks you need unique drops from. This could include Creatures of the Lost Grove, Vile Blooms, Nodon Dragonkin, Abyssal Lords, Abyssal Beasts, and Gemstone Dragons

smithing.desc: Forge steel bars into steel nails

For AFK Smithing experience, select a Mithril item that only requires 1 bar so you don't need to reheat it. Using this method you can smith a full inventory of items without clicking. Go all the way to Mithril +2.
Forge Adamant burial sets for increased experience (active) or Burial Adamant Gauntlets (AFK) at the Artisan's Workshop.
Forge Rune burial sets for increased experience (active) or Burial Rune Gauntlets (AFK) at the Artisan's Workshop.
Forge Orikalkum burial sets for increased experience (active) or Burial Orikalkum Gauntlets (AFK) at the Artisan's Workshop.
Forge Necronium burial sets for increased experience (active) or Burial Necronium Gauntlets (AFK) at the Artisan's Workshop.
Forge bane burial sets for increased experience (active) or Burial Banite Gauntlets (AFK) at the Artisan's Workshop.
Forge corrupted ore - Non optimal, but pretty AFK. Additional Corrupted ore can be obtained by using Crystal Keys on the chest in Prifddinas.
Forge Elder Rune burial sets for increased experience (active) or Burial Elder Rune Gauntlets (AFK) at the Artisan's Workshop.
Forge Primal Burial sets for increased experience (active) or Burial Primal Gauntlets (AFK) at the Artisan's Workshop.

strength.desc: Troll Chucker in Burthorpe north caves
Ghost Troll Brutes in Um after the Necromancy! Quest
Ghoul in Canifis or Fetid Zombie outside Fort Forinthry w/ Salve Amulet
Desert Bandits in Bandit Camp w/ 1 piece of Saradomin or Zamorak equipment. A Halberd type weapon is recommended for best experience rates.
Hellhound in Taverly Dungeon or the Wilderness, or Abyssal leech/walker/guardian in the Abyss. A Halberd type weapon is recommended for best experience rates.

Kill Flesh-Hatcher Mhekarnahz. This entry-level boss provides 50% more experience for your damage dealt compared to other options, which makes it a strong active training method. If your hit chance is below 100%, consider using a slash weapon and the Dragon Scimitar special attack for improved damage.
Abyssal leech/walker/guardian in the Abyss or Bound Skeletons outside Fort Forinthry w/ Salve Amulet. A Halberd type weapon is recommended for best experience rates.

Ravenous ghoul w/ Vampyric Blood Essence for Aggression, Abyssal leech/walker/guardian in the Abyss or Bound Skeletons outside Fort Forinthry w/ Salve Amulet. A Halberd type weapon is recommended for best experience rates.

Abyssal Demons, Savages, or Beasts, Ravenous ghoul w/ Vampyric Blood Essence for Aggression, Abyssal leech/walker/guardian in the Abyss, or Bound Skeletons outside Fort Forinthry w/ Salve Amulet. Alternatively, train passively by doing PvM or Slayer.

summoning.desc: Make dreadfowl Pouches. Chickens can be killed in Burthorpe and Lumbridge.
Make granite crab pouches. Iron ore can be mined at level 15.
Make pyrelord pouches. Tinderboxes can be purchased from the Firemaking Expert in Seers' Village
Make bloated leech pouches - Raw meat can be bought from the shop in Canifis.
Make spirit jelly pouches - Jugs of water can be purchased from Shantay in Al Kharid
Make mithril minotaurs or stranger plants - Mithril bars can be smelted, bagged plants can be purchased from, the Falador garden.
Make granite lobster pouches - Granite can be mined in the desert.
Make geyser titan pouches - Water talismans can be obtained from the Arch-Glacor, the Sanctum of Rebirth, and pickpocketing Wizard's Tower Mages.
Make pack yack pouches - Yak hide can be purchased in Neitiznot

thieving.desc: Pickpocket men and woman in Lumbridge, or Pompous Merchants in Burthorpe
Steal from bakery stalls - This is a good source of early game food.
Pickpocket Gullible Tourists in Menaphos or Pick locks on Thieves' Guild jail doors in the Lumbridge cellar.
Pickpocket Dwarf traders with Sticky Fingers Relic and Pickpocketing Bag

Vault of Hereditas Heist - You may want to wait until level 98 to boost to level 102 with an Abyssal Lurker Scroll, so you can loot the safes. 72 Agility is also recommended for this but is not needed.
The Arsuran Arsenal Heist - You may want to wait until level 110 to boost to level 114 with an Abyssal Lurker Scroll, so you can loot the safes. This is a dangerous activity, and is not a safe death.

woodcutting.desc: Cut Regular Trees in Lumbridge or Burthorpe
Cut Willow Trees in Draynor Village, or Seers' Village
Cut Maple Trees in Seers' Village
Cut Ivy. You may choose to chop other trees if you need logs or wood box upgrades.
Cut Golden Bamboo on the arc
